contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Built and deployed Telegram attention watchdog (Sophia nudges unanswered asks)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/102
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/301
  
  Details:
  Implemented the minimal Telegram attention watchdog scoped after the June 12 cacao-serving coordination miss. New app/attention_watchdog.py in truesight_autopilot: a read-only Telethon MTProto user-session long-runner (own systemd unit, same single-instance pattern as the bot adapter) that tracks awaiting-Gary state when an incoming message is a DM, mentions him, or replies to him AND is question-shaped; date references tighten the nudge SLA (2h vs 4h) but alone are not asks, guarding against smalltalk false positives. Clears when Gary posts in the chat; nudges and a daily 9am digest go to Saved Messages only; max one nudge per chat per day; 7-day TTL; JSON state survives restarts; no LLM and no auto-replies so message content never leaves the box. Includes one-time interactive login helper (scripts/telethon_login.py), systemd unit + deploy.sh session-gated start, gitignore hardening for session files, .env.example documentation, and 17 unit tests over the pure heuristics including the exact June-12 message shape. Merged and deployed to the sophia EC2 box (telethon 1.43.2 installed, unit installed and correctly held stopped pending the operator's one-time Telegram login). OPEN_FOLLOWUPS entry moved to Recently shipped.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
